hotel_name: Days Inn by Hampton Near Coliseum Convention Center

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Drugs addicts all around the places doesn’t look like the picture at all

reviews.title: If I could give it “0” stars I would
reviews.text: To begin with, on the website it says they have breakfast, breakfast was coffee, a juice machine that didn’t work, and granola bars. The guy at the front desk was rude. Once we get INTO the room, we were given a HALF empty shampoo bottle, and to put the icing on the cake, there was BLOOD ALL OVER THE MIRROR. We traveled to that location for work, thank GOD we will never be back. I wouldn’t stay at that hotel if it was the only one available. I would sleep in my car.

reviews.title: Worst room I've ever stayed at.
reviews.text: The first room didn't have a door chain to secure the door, but it did have numerous screw holes where the chain used to be and assuming where it was broken into. I immediately requested a new room which required walking all the way back to the lobby area which was more like a drive through window than a reception desk. The second room was not much better. Chain was on the door but it also had several previous screw holes where previous chains were attached. At this point I already did not feel safe. The sheets and the bedding had numerous visible stains. The thermostat on the heater/ac unit was damaged. The temperature buttons looked like they were stabbed with a large knife. There was no way of adjusting the room temperature. The bed felt like a crater. I attempted to make the best of it since it was late already. There was noise outside my room along the balcony from 11p-2a. Sounded like groups of people cursing and running up and down the balcony outside my room. I dared not look and instead put a chair in front of the door. Woke up early to take a shower only to find that the water was only either extremely hot or extremely cold. No in between. The shower head had zero pressure so the water essentially dripped from the shower head. I packed up and found another hotel room in the area. I informed the receptionist that I was checking out early and asked for any documentation that would show that. He was only able to print out my reservation and with a pen change my check out date. I would never stay at this hotel again and would prob not stay at a Days Inn ever again. My clothes which were in my luggage also reeked of smoke/air freshener after being in the room for less than 8 hours.

reviews.title: Worst Experience
reviews.text: We arrived late at the property so there was no time to check out the property. The n ext day was my brothers funeral, so we reserved two rooms to be able to have the 4 of us get ready on time.  We reserved the rooms as nonsmoking because my husband has emphysema and I have severe asthma. When we entered this room it smelled of smoke.  The bed pillows smelled of smoke. Clearly we were not put into a nonsmoking room.  The bathroom door would not shut. when I showered the water came out on the floor, the towel became filthy from the dirty floor.  When we went for coffee and breakfast the next morning, we found only coffee and a couple of granola bars. We were told they did not have a continental breakfast only a few breakfast items, We paid to have breakfast .  Reservations stated there was an indoor pool, all we saw was a mucky outdoor pool. Clearly we were disappointed because nothing matched up to what the reservation was expecting. Very disappointed and should not have had to pay for this.

reviews.title: Don’t stay here!
reviews.text:
No breakfast as advertised... 
Holes in sheets and blankets 
Dirty floors and bathroom 
Stay someplace else !!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: There pool is never open or clean ,they run out of towels and toilet paper frequently. Elevator smells of pee. Homeless try to check your doors at night, to see if they are open. When you you complain to the front office the dirty penny looking ass gets rude and disrespectful. they're all illegally working here , running credit cards info back to India. Ice should check them out.

reviews.title: Stood next to the trap house
reviews.text: Don't go here. Rooms not cleaned at all.

reviews.title: Sleep in your car
reviews.text: I never stayed in a hotel with roaches until here

reviews.title: Bugs
reviews.text: There was roaches crowling over everything juice stain ain dkuue

reviews.title: Nasty Outside
reviews.text: This Days Inn was the absolute worst Days Inn I had ever seen, Trashy people hanging out everywhere around the complex, the Motel itself was NASTY !!!

reviews.title: Diamond Membership means nothing.
reviews.text: Repeat, frequent customers and relationships are not valued here. They will leave you hanging without working to make a reasonable accomodation.
reviews.room_type: 1 King Bed, Mobility Accessible Room, Roll-In Shower, Non-Smoking

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Rooms are messy the Jamaican lady at the front desk is extremely rude it all types of activities all night long I would not book this room

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: They could do a lot better cleaning

reviews.title: Do not recommend
reviews.text: The staff is so rude. From the front desk to the maid. I couldnt believe how rude everyone was. The room was dirty, 5 min walking on the floor and our socks were black. The floors were so nasty and i cant understand why, the are supposed to be mopped regularly. Smh. I dont knoe how they could be so rude when the place was so nasty. Pool was nasty, stagnant, and mold growing around the edges. They say they have breakfast, breakfast consisted of a granola bar and coffee. Never again, if you want to stay at a days inn i recommend the extra few minute drive to the newport news one.

reviews.title: Unpleasant
reviews.text: Paid for a non smoking king. First room we were presented with smelled of smoke and floors were sticky to walk on. 2nd attempt had cigarette burns on the comforter, smelled, dirty bathroom, and a giant spider on the wall.

reviews.title: Dirty room
reviews.text: Checked in early to a dirty room the attendant told me it was my fault when I called to complain about stringy hair in the bed. Dirty rags at the top of the shower and hair in the drain. Cigarette burns on a bed my kids slept in supposed to be a non smoking room

reviews.title: RENT TO LOCALS
reviews.text: THIS PLACE WAS THE WORST!! WHEN I FACILITIES RENT TO LOCALS ITS TOO MUCH TRAFFIC COMING IN AND OUT!! COULDN'T SLEEP FOR THE NOISE

reviews.title: Not clean with roaches
reviews.text: Place dirty rooms smell like smoke  roaches in bathroom . I WOULD NOT USE THE SHOWER

reviews.title: Nasty
reviews.text: Hotel has drug addition stay there.  Linen is over 4 years old.  Coffee was like mud

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: All of these pictures are not of this actual days inn! There is NO breakfast just juice and the rooms are dirty with stains on the sheets, pubic hair in the shower and roaches!!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Sheets had stains so i went to walmart bought my own. Came back and got ready for bed. When i cut the bathroom light on roaches scattered! The front office took me to look at another room that had dirty shoe prints on top of the covers. I was able to get my money back through Agoda thankfully! Absolutely disgusting 🤮

reviews.title: Avoid!
reviews.text: Unless you're comfortable with roaches, people nodding out on the stairs, broken TVs and refrigerators, and just overall grime, you'll be better off avoiding this place. Agoda shouldn't even be listing this "hotel" on their site. Don't trust the photos.

reviews.title: Go some where else
reviews.text: This motel doesn't allow cancellations, and the rooms aren't worth $100+ a night.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Something is always growing on at this hotel they don't like to clean the rooms they run out of toilet paper a lot their breakfast is always down as the same as their pool facility. They don't work on it they just say they do so you don't even get what you pay for.

reviews.title: FILTHY ROOM
reviews.text: This room was absolutely terrible and I would never recommend it. I checked in in the evening and didn't really look at the room much because I was tired and just needed to go out and get something to eat and come back and go to bed. I did notice that the sink area was bad and I actually wiped it down myself but didn't think about maybe staff could have missed something which wasn't that big of a deal at the time. I also had no coffee pot in which I notified these things to the office next morning I notified the office again and about more unfriendliness that unraveled as I got to really looking around and it was gross as I could not wear my socks on the floor because of how dirty the floor was. I do not wear shoes in the house but I had to in this room because of how bad it was. The shower foot tile turned brown after it got wet and was used on the floor is how bad the floors were and I notified the multiple times and they beat around the bush so I would end up staying into another day to be charged for another day. I finally checked out approximately 2:30 PM ish today

reviews.title: Days inn
reviews.text: The staff was very rude. The rooms appeared to be clean but looking deeper, the floors were disgusting, now way they have mopped recently. Under tables, dressers, and beds was crumbs and trash. The refridgerator was nasty. Also, seen a roach in the bathroom. We were very disappointed in the cleanliness.

reviews.title: Horrible customer service and Very dirty hotel
reviews.text: Breakfast is nothing but juice, staff was very unaccommodating and rude.  Hotel was scary with drug dealers, homeless ppl and prostitutes all around the facility .  My girls were not allowed to go anywhere without me.  Would never stay there again not even for the price,  not worth it.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: Moved to 5 diff rooms, customer service is horrible and there were roaches in one of the rooms

reviews.title: The maid service was horrible

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
I checked in at 3 later that evening I went to the desk to get another key for my spouse was first told I wasn’t checked in , then told I stole the room key, then told the woman that checked me in didn’t check me in but gave me a key to get into the pool (which was gross ). Then Then man that was harassing me cold me a liar, threatened to call the law then took it upon himself to cancel the next 3 days of my stay in renounced to me. Because I booked through a third party , that automatically generated a partial refund. So I had to repay and talk to management in the Am.
Knowing that his employee had treated me this way and caused me to literally be on the street the management DID NOTHING

reviews.title: Shabby
reviews.text: This place was convenient, but for a couple hundred bucks a night, not even that was worth it. The floors of the room weren't swept, it reeked of stale old-ness and smoke, and was so old and outdated. The air quality in the hotel was obviously terrible because there were a bunch of deadbeat degenerates walking around breathing out of balloons and popping them all day and night.

reviews.title: Very unprofessional
reviews.text: Front Desk unprofessional. Housekeeping gets paid to do nothing. They rented a room to a family with 4 small kids and accused my 16 and 18 yr old kids of running and screaming up and stairs at 8am

reviews.title: Wyndham Days Inn Coliseum
reviews.text: DO NOT STAY ON THE 1ST FLOOR!!! EVERY ROOM ON THE 1ST FLOOR IS INFESTED WITH ROACHES!!!! The second floor, not as bad, and none on the 3rd floor. However, I've stayed in multiple rooms with cobwebs all over the ceiling, the vending machines ONLY work on the 1st floor, they NEVER have any clean washclothes when the maids are turning over the rooms, some rooms are infested with bed bugs, and the STAFF IS VERY RUDE AND NASTY!!! DO NOT STAY HERE UNLESS THERE IS NO OTHER HOTEL OPTION!!! WYNDHAM REWARDS NEEDS TO REMOVE THIS HOTEL AS A 2 STAR HOTEL LEVEL!!! 😡🤬

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: They need better communication with their guests They say one thing and do another that had me highly upset

reviews.title: Not what I expected
reviews.text: With the name Wyndham I expected a nice place to stay. We had no heat in the room the first night. The towel racks were about to fall; the safety lock on the door had been broken; none of the outlets were tight; breakfast was granola bars and no orange juice. We were offered room service on the third night of our stay.  We felt like we survived rather than having enjoyed the stay.
reviews.room_type: 1 King Bed, Mobility Accessible Room, Roll-In Shower, Non-Smoking

reviews.title: FILTHY DIRTY CHEAP
reviews.text: Yep you read that correct! I spent 3 hours cleaning the floors in the entire room without exaggeration I used about six towels a dozen washcloths and nearly as many handhelds of my own personal things to get the bathroom floor clean those towels were coming up looking like I was soaking them in my puddles even after 3 hours the floors were still not coming anywhere near clean but I was exhausted and I needed a shower more than ever which I had to go out to my car and get some flip flops so I could use them as shower shoest.  This place is the most disgusting and filthy dirty place I've ever seen in my life. The only thing I can say in positive is it was "dirt" cheap and there were no bugs.

There's no luxury amenities, but there's nothing to complain about. My mom enjoyed her emergency stay in an accessible room.  I would recommend Days Inn  because of the location and value.

reviews.title: You Get What You Pay For
reviews.text: It's cheap but crappy. Woke up to a party in the next room at 2am with loud music, slamming doors, and the smell of weed. No free breakfast as advertised; the breakfast room was locked and the front desk guy pointed to a bowl of granola bars and a coffee machine and told me that's what they have. Had I known it'd be like this, I would have paid extra to stay somewhere more quiet with free breakfast. Live and learn.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: They are ok there is no big breakfast just snacks and coffee or juice they need to bring breakfast back

reviews.title: A place to sleep
reviews.text:
A place to sleep when seeing a show at the Coliseum. Pros: Surfaces of countertops and bathroom were clean. Bathroom looked remodeled.  Short walk to Coliseum.  No detection of bed bugs.
Cons: floor was a disgusting black even after wiping it down with  cleaner.  Place was old and run down.  Only offered coffee and juice for breakfast. 
I wouldn’t stay here with my family. But it worked for a guys trip to see Goose at the Coliseum.

reviews.title: Getting worst
reviews.text: I used to love staying here over the last few years. But recently roaches have taken over tremendously. I have ask staff several times to change my room and they did...but no better. Baby roaches coming from around the bathroom sink and shower. Just a nightmare.... Other then that great bed and cozy. They have to get those roaches CHECKED!

reviews.title: Good

reviews.response:
Thanks for your Review..We always are committed to give exceptional service to our guest.On behalf of my Employee please accept our apology and i am giving you assurance you will have comfortable stay and good hotel staff service..
we hope to see you again.

reviews.title: You Get What You Pay For
reviews.text: Cheapest place to stay in Hampton. Sometimes it's noisy late at night and sometimes it smells like weed. Sometimes the floor is kind of sticky and gross. There is no free breakfast. If you literally just want a cheap place to sleep and nothing else matters, this is it.

reviews.title: Second worst hotel I have stayed at
reviews.text:
Bathroom door hinge was broken so you had to lift it up to close and open it. Refrigerator was leaking all over the floor so I had to cover it up with a towel
I got in late, so it was frustrating. Have to deal with these things.

reviews.title: Very good

It was about 4 when I went to sleep and it was a young lady cussing and fussing about calling the police the whole night. Shoes were pulled outside by most of the doors. People were smoking and drinking hanging over the rail. The room was not bad other than it was NO HOT WATER

reviews.title: Permanent stay
reviews.text: Great place for permanent residence with decent rates

reviews.title: One Roach, One Mild Discourtesy
reviews.text:
Stay went as expected. Found some sort of roach or waterbug in the shower on the second night. Cleaning staff was courteous with towels and other daily services.
Checkout went a lil rocky. As a disabled person it takes me much longer in the mornings than most others. I called for a late checkout, and my question was received with frustration and I was very firmly told that I could have solely an extra 30 minutes. Given my limitations this did not allow me enough reasonable time to shower or do anything besides begin the slow process of packing my things. By far, as a disabled person, I don't expect the world, however a late checkout seemed a reasonable request. The immediate frustration and anger voiced to me and unwillingness to accommodate a reasonable need upon checkout will likely keep me from booking again.
reviews.room_type: 1 King Bed, Mobility Accessible Room, Roll-In Shower, Non-Smoking

reviews.title: Nice and clean

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Check in was less than 3 minutes and the room was clean.

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Once again I’ve stayed at this facility 3 times this week and my only complaint is the floors in the rooms NEVER get mopped with good clean soap and water. Within minutes if you walk around the room barefoot the bottoms of your feet will be black as coal!!!  I suggest wearing shoes or black socks if you don’t want your feet filthy.

reviews.title: Ok for the price
reviews.text: For the price you can’t beat it! Rooms are pretty clean except they never seem to mop the floors! Don’t go barefoot or your feet will be black from the dirty floors within 5 minutes of walking around and when you shower the black dirt just runs down the tub!

reviews.title: The Room needs a full remodel
reviews.text:
Although the Inn was across the street from the Convention Center and we could walk to our grandson's graduation, 
the room was hideous. We took showers at Planet Fitnesd because the shower walls and floor was nasty. The bed covers and sheets had stains. The air vent had a empty air freshener and was dusty. There were crumbs (I hope) beside the nightstand. A group of guests were cooking, singing,  and playing music in the parking lot across from our room. Never again!
reviews.room_type: 1 King Bed, Mobility Accessible Room, Roll-In Shower, Non-Smoking

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: I had an excellent stay at this hotel. The value for money was great, with affordable rates and fantastic facilities. The location was convenient, close to the Coliseum Convention Center. The cleanliness of the property was top-notch, and the staff were friendly and helpful. The parking was convenient, and the housekeeping did a great job. The hot water was always available, and the view from my room was lovely. The transport options nearby made it easy to explore the area. Overall, I highly recommend this hotel for a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This was a two night stay! They have ready breakfast granola bars, coffee, and juice. It would be great for the business if they had more breakfast selections such as the cereal, oatmeal, and toast, bananas like the Days Inn near the Oyster point area.

reviews.title: Location and convenience
reviews.text:
I truly enjoyed my stay. The room was clean and the bed was comfortable (plenty 
of fluffy pillows, clean sheets, fresh blankets, etc). They even had a pool. The location is perfect for plenty of restaurants, shopping and good food. I will definitely stay again.

reviews.title: Awesome place for the amount
reviews.text: Me and my girlfriend friend spent a great amount of time her the front office people are extremely nice and helpful with our situation. The room service is excellent and always makes sure you have what you need I would definitely recommend this hotel . Great staff very clean rooms

reviews.title: Excellent stay
reviews.text: Very clean staff is very friendly . Me and girlfriend were treated very well here had a day or two were I was a little late on my money for the day in wich they were very understanding about give me ample time to get it. I would recommend this hotel to any travelers look for great quality at a modest price.
